Waste is not collected for more than a third of the world population.

Augeas is building the most efficient first-mile infrastructure in waste management.

Our solution
Users get rewarded
An incentive engine drives collection and sorting.
Live monitoring
Fill-levels, scrap volumes, and level of contamination are monitored in real time.
Materials sold
Sorted raw materials are sold to recycling centers.

Augeas unlocks traceable secondary aluminum in underserved regions.
